Name: VK_LAYER_KHRONOS_validation
Description: The main validation layer - catches incorrect API usage and gives helpful error messages

Name: VK_LAYER_RENDERDOC_Capture
Description: Injected automatically by RenderDoc to enable GPU frame capture and debugging

Name: VK_LAYER_MESA_overlay
Description: Linux only - renders an on-screen overlay showing FPS and GPU stats

Name: VK_LAYER_LUNARG_api_dump
Description: Logs every Vulkan API call and its parameters to stdout or a file - useful for tracing

Name: VK_LAYER_LUNARG_monitor
Description: Displays FPS in the application window title bar

Name: VK_KHR_surface
Description: Base surface extension required for rendering to any window - almost always needed

Name: VK_KHR_win32_surface
Description: Windows-specific surface support for creating a renderable window surface

Name: VK_KHR_xcb_surface
Description: Linux/X11 XCB surface support

Name: VK_KHR_xlib_surface
Description: Linux/X11 Xlib surface support

Name: VK_KHR_wayland_surface
Description: Linux Wayland surface support

Name: VK_KHR_metal_surface
Description: macOS/iOS Metal surface support

Name: VK_EXT_debug_utils
Description: Enables validation layer message callbacks and lets you name objects for easier debugging

Name: VK_EXT_debug_report
Description: Older debug callback extension - prefer VK_EXT_debug_utils for new projects

Name: VK_KHR_get_physical_device_properties2
Description: Exposes extended physical device properties - required by many device extensions

Name: VK_KHR_swapchain
Description: Required for presenting rendered frames to a window surface

Name: VK_KHR_dynamic_rendering
Description: Lets you skip creating explicit RenderPass and Framebuffer objects - modern style

Name: VK_KHR_buffer_device_address
Description: Allows getting a GPU pointer to a buffer - needed for ray tracing and advanced techniques

Name: VK_EXT_descriptor_indexing
Description: Enables bindless textures and dynamic descriptor arrays

Name: VK_KHR_synchronization2
Description: Improved and simplified API for pipeline barriers and synchronization

Name: VK_KHR_ray_tracing_pipeline
Description: Adds ray tracing shader stages (raygen

Name: VK_KHR_acceleration_structure
Description: Provides BLAS/TLAS acceleration structures required for ray tracing

Name: VK_KHR_shader_draw_parameters
Description: Exposes gl_DrawID and gl_BaseInstance in shaders for indirect drawing

Name: VK_EXT_mesh_shader
Description: Adds mesh and task shader stages replacing the traditional vertex pipeline

Name: VK_KHR_multiview
Description: Allows rendering to multiple views in one pass - used for VR stereo rendering

Name: VK_EXT_memory_budget
Description: Reports how much VRAM you are using and how much is available on the GPU

Name: VK_KHR_dedicated_allocation
Description: Hints to the driver to give a resource its own dedicated memory allocation
